testsuite.name: Network Layer Integration

testcase.name: should aggregate health status from all components
should discover and transfer blob between two nodes
should track peer events across unified network

testsuite.system-out: 22:47:29.729 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: FlwlQbplUXkn4SwTxbpB2A==, expected response: AVo1kEziH9EH2tPRy/93rJwJIlU= 22:47:29.745 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.maxCapacityPerThread: 4096 22:47:29.745 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.ratio: 8 22:47:29.745 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.chunkSize: 32 22:47:29.745 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.blocking: false 22:47:29.745 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.batchFastThreadLocalOnly: true 22:47:29.806 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x89b855f9, L:/127.0.0.1:65055 - R:/127.0.0.1:65057] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 22:47:29.807 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: FlwlQbplUXkn4SwTxbpB2A==, response: AVo1kEziH9EH2tPRy/93rJwJIlU= Connecting to: ws://127.0.0.1:65094 22:47:41.588 [nioEventLoopGroup-51-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: fp4A3jhooFhfPA8/FDPG9Q==, expected response: 7kCnQiQxhnLPVtD5wZRuQTfhhAU= 22:47:41.593 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x8b42aedf, L:/127.0.0.1:65094 - R:/127.0.0.1:65096] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 22:47:41.594 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: fp4A3jhooFhfPA8/FDPG9Q==, response: 7kCnQiQxhnLPVtD5wZRuQTfhhAU= Connection successful
